name: arca
title: Arca
description: Task management where simplicity meets capability
author: ghadeer

commands.name: create-task
commands.title: Create Task
commands.description: Creates a task in a specific list

commands.name: my-tasks
commands.title: My Tasks
commands.description: View all tasks assigned to you across all workspaces

commands.name: planned
commands.title: Planned Tasks
commands.description: View tasks with due or start dates, grouped by date

preferences.name: apiKey
preferences.title: Arca API Key
preferences.description: Your Arca API key for authenticating requests.

preferences.name: showCompletedTasks
preferences.title: Show Completed Tasks
preferences.label: Show completed & cancelled tasks
preferences.description: When enabled, completed and cancelled tasks are shown in the My Tasks command.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
